description: Machine-readable explainability rules registry for LENS NextGen Evidence Panels and Explainability Surfaces. 30 rules across 11 domains.

explainability_rules.name: WHY Panel Content Source Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: WHY panel content must be sourced exclusively from report_object.narrative_block.why_section. No content generation at render time.
explainability_rules.check: why_panel.content_blocks all have content sourced from committed narrative_block.why_section
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Any WHY panel content not present in committed report_object

explainability_rules.name: WHY Panel Executive Phrasing Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: WHY panel must apply all NORM-NARR and NORM-FORBID rules. Predictive, recommendation, speculative, and chatbot language forbidden.
explainability_rules.check: why_panel content passes NORM-FORBID-01..04 vocabulary check
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Any forbidden vocabulary category A-H detected in WHY panel content

explainability_rules.name: WHY Panel Qualifier-Aware Rendering
explainability_rules.description: WHY panel must render qualifier notice when qualifier_class ≠ Q-00. Q-04 must render absence notice. Qualifier suppression is forbidden.
explainability_rules.check: qualifier_class ≠ Q-00 → qualifier notice rendered; qualifier_class = Q-04 → absence notice rendered
explainability_rules.fail_condition: qualifier_class ≠ Q-00 and no qualifier notice rendered in WHY panel

explainability_rules.name: Evidence Drawer Source Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Evidence drawer content must be sourced exclusively from committed evidence_blocks[]. No supplementation from external sources.
explainability_rules.check: evidence_drawers sourced only from report_object.evidence_blocks[]
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Evidence drawer content not present in committed report_object.evidence_blocks[]

explainability_rules.name: Evidence Immutability Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Evidence content is immutable after bridge crossing. LENS cannot modify, annotate, reorder, or supplement evidence drawer content.
explainability_rules.check: evidence_drawers.immutable = true; no mutation fields in schema
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Any evidence drawer field modifiable by LENS rendering layer

explainability_rules.name: Evidence Hierarchy Ordering Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Evidence drawers must be ordered: ORIGIN first, RECEIVER next, PASS_THROUGH next, ISOLATED last. Grounding status chip must be visible in collapsed drawer header.
explainability_rules.check: evidence_drawers ordered by propagation_role; grounding_label visible in collapsed state
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Evidence drawers out of propagation-role order; grounding status chip hidden in collapsed state

explainability_rules.name: TRACE Panel Propagation Path Alias Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Propagation path must use ALI-04 domain aliases. Raw cluster keys and raw domain IDs are forbidden in TRACE panel display.
explainability_rules.check: trace_object.propagation_path entries are ALI-04 aliases; no raw topology identifiers
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Raw cluster keys or domain IDs present in propagation path display

explainability_rules.name: TRACE Panel Derivation Reference Non-Decode Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Derivation hash and evidence_object_hash in TRACE panel must be rendered as opaque reference identifiers only. No decoding, explanation, or interpretation of hash values.
explainability_rules.check: derivation_ref rendered as first 8 chars + '...'; no decoded interpretation in any surface
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Hash value decoded or interpreted in any client surface

explainability_rules.name: TRACE Panel Collapsed-by-Default Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: TRACE panel must be collapsed by default in executive view. Advisory view may expand by default.
explainability_rules.check: trace_panel.default_state = COLLAPSED for EXECUTIVE audience
explainability_rules.fail_condition: TRACE panel expanded by default for EXECUTIVE audience

explainability_rules.name: Qualifier Mandatory Visibility Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Qualifier chips and notices are mandatory when qualifier_class ≠ Q-00. No qualifier can be hidden for aesthetic or UX simplicity reasons.
explainability_rules.check: qualifier_class ≠ Q-00 → qualifier chip rendered on readiness badge; qualifier notice in QUALIFIERS panel
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Qualifier chip absent when qualifier_class ≠ Q-00

explainability_rules.name: Q-04 Absence Notice Mandatory Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: When qualifier_class = Q-04, QUALIFIERS panel must render explicit absence notice: 'Signal intelligence withheld from this view.' Silent suppression of Q-04 is a governance violation.
explainability_rules.check: qualifier_class = Q-04 → absence_notice present and rendered in QUALIFIERS panel
explainability_rules.fail_condition: qualifier_class = Q-04 and absence notice absent or suppressed

explainability_rules.name: Qualifier Vocabulary Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Qualifier labels must use Q-taxonomy chip labels from vocabulary contract. Raw Q-xx enum values (Q-01, Q-02, etc.) are forbidden in any executive surface.
explainability_rules.check: qualifier chip labels match vocabulary_contract.qualifier_vocabulary.approved_terms; raw Q-xx values not in display
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Raw Q-xx enum values (Q-01, Q-02, Q-03, Q-04) rendered in any executive surface

explainability_rules.name: Lineage Panel Audience Tier Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: LINEAGE panel is advisory-visible by default. Executive tier does not see LINEAGE panel. Audit tier sees full lineage including run_id and full hash values.
explainability_rules.check: lineage_panel audience = ADVISORY; executive view does not render lineage panel; audit view sees full values
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Full hash values visible to EXECUTIVE tier; LINEAGE panel shown to EXECUTIVE by default

explainability_rules.name: Lineage Non-Decode Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Lineage references (evidence_object_hash, derivation_hash, stream_anchor) must never be decoded, explained, or interpreted in any client surface.
explainability_rules.check: all hash and anchor values rendered as opaque reference identifiers; no decoded explanation
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Any lineage reference decoded or interpreted in client surface

explainability_rules.name: Non-Probabilistic Confidence Rendering Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: CONFIDENCE panel must not render any numerical confidence score, percentage, or probabilistic framing. Confidence is expressed as grounding scope only.
explainability_rules.check: confidence_panel content contains no numerical probability values; probabilistic_scoring_prohibited = true
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Any numerical confidence percentage, confidence bar, or probabilistic scoring visible in CONFIDENCE panel

explainability_rules.name: Confidence Panel Grounding Vocabulary Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: CONFIDENCE panel must use approved grounding vocabulary: Full Grounding, Partial Coverage, Structural View, Under Review. Probabilistic alternatives forbidden.
explainability_rules.check: confidence_panel grounding labels match vocabulary_contract.evidence_vocabulary.grounding_labels
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Grounding labels deviate from vocabulary contract

explainability_rules.name: Readiness Label Alias Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: READINESS_STATE panel must use ALI-03 executive labels for readiness state. Raw ReadinessState enum values (EXECUTIVE_READY, DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY, etc.) are forbidden in any executive surface.
explainability_rules.check: readiness_explanation.readiness_label matches vocabulary_contract.readiness_vocabulary.approved_terms[].executive_label
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Raw ReadinessState enum value rendered in READINESS_STATE panel

explainability_rules.name: Readiness Reclassification Prohibition
explainability_rules.description: LENS rendering layer cannot recompute, reinterpret, or reclassify the readiness_state. The readiness_state is immutable from report_object commitment.
explainability_rules.check: readiness_state field is read-only; no LENS computation modifies readiness_state
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Any LENS layer operation modifies or recomputes readiness_state

explainability_rules.name: Progressive Disclosure Non-Removal Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Collapse/expand is a display state change only. No evidence is removed when a panel or drawer is collapsed. Collapsed elements retain all committed content.
explainability_rules.check: collapsed panels retain content; expand reveals pre-rendered committed content unchanged
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Evidence removed or unavailable after collapse/expand cycle

explainability_rules.name: Progressive Disclosure No-Computation Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: No computation occurs at expand time. Evidence drawers and panels open to pre-rendered committed content. No external fetch on expand.
explainability_rules.check: drawer expand triggers no computation; no external data fetch at expand time
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Any computation or external fetch triggered at panel or drawer expand time

explainability_rules.name: Audience Tier Visibility Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Audience tier determines panel visibility and field exposure. Executive tier cannot access advisory/audit-only content. No client-side tier elevation.
explainability_rules.check: executive tier: TRACE collapsed, LINEAGE hidden, hashes hidden; advisory tier: lineage abbreviated; audit tier: full values
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Higher-tier content visible to lower-tier audience; client-side tier elevation possible

explainability_rules.name: Audience Tier Immutability at Session Level
explainability_rules.description: Audience tier is set at session initialization. It cannot be elevated at panel-open time, drawer-expand time, or by any panel interaction.
explainability_rules.check: audience_tier set at session; no panel interaction alters audience_tier
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Audience tier modified by any panel interaction

explainability_rules.name: Blocked State Explicit Rendering Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Blocked state must render an explicit BLOCKED notice. Silent degradation to a lower readiness state or blank panel is a governance violation.
explainability_rules.check: panel_state = BLOCKED → blocked_notice rendered and visible
explainability_rules.fail_condition: BLOCKED panel renders silently (blank panel, degraded state, or default content instead of blocked notice)

explainability_rules.name: Full Bundle Block on Hash Failure
explainability_rules.description: If evidence_object_hash is missing or fails verification, ALL panels in the bundle must enter BLOCKED state. Partial rendering from a failed hash is a governance violation.
explainability_rules.check: evidence_object_hash missing or mismatch → all 7 panels = BLOCKED
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Any panel renders content when evidence_object_hash verification fails

explainability_rules.name: Diagnostic State Explicit Rendering Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Diagnostic state must render an explicit DIAGNOSTIC notice. Silent rendering without a diagnostic indicator is a governance violation.
explainability_rules.check: panel_state = DIAGNOSTIC → diagnostic_notice rendered and visible
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Diagnostic panel renders without diagnostic indicator

explainability_rules.name: Normalization Version Mismatch Diagnostic
explainability_rules.description: If rendering_metadata.normalization_version does not match the expected version, narrative panels enter DIAGNOSTIC state. Rendering proceeds with diagnostic notice.
explainability_rules.check: normalization_version mismatch → narrative panels (WHY, EVIDENCE, READINESS_STATE) → DIAGNOSTIC
explainability_rules.fail_condition: normalization_version mismatch not surfaced to rendering layer

explainability_rules.name: Deterministic Explainability Rendering
explainability_rules.description: Same report_object + same audience_tier + same phase must always produce the same explainability panel structure, content, and states. No stochastic rendering.
explainability_rules.check: render(report_object, audience_tier, phase) is idempotent and deterministic
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Two renderings of the same report_object produce different panel content or states

explainability_rules.name: Session State Non-Influence Enforcement
explainability_rules.description: Session state, user identity, and interaction history must not influence panel content. Panel content is derived from report_object only.
explainability_rules.check: panel content identical across sessions for same report_object and audience_tier
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Panel content differs based on session state, user identity, or interaction history

explainability_rules.name: No Live AI Generation in Explainability
explainability_rules.description: No explainability panel may contain content generated at render time by any AI system. All panel content is committed at generation time and pre-rendered.
explainability_rules.check: live_generation_prohibited = true; no runtime AI call in panel rendering path
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Any panel content generated by live AI call at render time

explainability_rules.name: No Free-Form Query or Conversational Interaction
explainability_rules.description: No explainability panel may contain a free-form text input, conversational AI entry point, or any form of live query capability. Phase 2 interaction is EXPAND_COLLAPSE only.
explainability_rules.check: no text input fields in explainability bundle; no conversational interaction affordances; COPILOT_ENTRY interaction = active: false
explainability_rules.fail_condition: Any free-form text input, conversational AI entry, or live query field present in Phase 2 explainability surface
